content: Read the PRD at .trellis/tasks/06-02-replace-custom-drag-with-dnd-kit/prd.md for full requirements.

Key files to read before implementing:
- src/features/project/components/ProjectsPanel.tsx (rendering local/WSL/remote sections)
- src/features/project/components/ProjectItem.tsx (local item, currently uses useProjectItemDrag)
- src/features/project/components/useProjectItemDrag.ts (TO DELETE)
- src/features/project/components/DraggableProjectItem.tsx (TO DELETE)
- src/features/connection/components/ConnectionProjectCard.tsx (WSL/Remote item, uses useProjectItemDrag)
- src/features/connection/components/RemoteItems.tsx (WSL/Remote wrapper, curries entryId into onDragEnd)
- src/features/project/components/projectItemTypes.ts (onDragEnd type)
- src/features/project/components/index.ts (exports to clean up)
- src/features/project/index.ts (exports to clean up)

Implementation order:
1. pnpm add @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/modifiers @dnd-kit/utilities
2. Refactor ProjectItem.tsx to use useSortable (remove useProjectItemDrag + DraggableProjectItem wrapper)
3. Refactor ConnectionProjectCard.tsx same way
4. Wrap local section in ProjectsPanel.tsx with DndContext + SortableContext
5. Wrap each WSL/Remote entry in RemoteItems.tsx with DndContext + SortableContext
6. Delete useProjectItemDrag.ts and DraggableProjectItem.tsx
7. Clean up exports in index.ts files
8. Run pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm test:run
